title: OHS Throws for Sofa Ribbed Faux Fur, Decorative Thick Soft Blanket Bed Throw Cosy Warm Winter Blanket Throws for Sofa Decorative Couch Cover, 125 x 150cm - Red
features: Ribbed Throw Blanket: Stylish ribbed faux fur throw designed in red made from soft throw fabric. Warm throws for sofa are perfect in winter keeping you cosy and relaxed on beds, as throws for sofa or as a couch cover.

125cm x 150cm: Christmas blanket throw sized for cuddling up on beds and sofas. Thick rib blanket can be used as kids blanket, pet blanket, travel blanket, decorative couch cover, calming blanket or just to snuggle up with.

Warm super soft bed throw for winter months with enhanced ultra soft faux fur softness. You'll love snuggling under thick blanket throw as the temperature drops. Great for keeping warm on summer evenings outside or camping trips.

Red throw blanket featuring ribbed faux fur 300gsm front, with 220gsm ultra soft reverse. Blankets for sofas made from durable 100% soft polyester. Easy care bed throw machine washable at 30°C and tumble dry on low heat.

Christmas gift for women this holiday season or perfect present on Birthdays, Mothers Day, or Fathers Day. Sofa blanket for adults perfect living rooms and bedrooms as decorative throw, travel blanket or camping throw.
